Partial Credit
Submission reflects on at least half of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.

Submission does not reflect completion of the guidelines or prompts outlined in the instructions and time spent writing.
100 pts

Week 4 | Discussion: Compare and Contrast - Prewriting

Compare and Contrast - Prewriting
Instructions
Your discussion will occur in class.

Discussion Topic
Share your prewrite activity for your compare and contrast essay. Use your own unique topic, or choose from one of the following topics:

Two different drinks or foods (ex., Coke vs. Pepsi)
Two different animals (ex., Dogs vs. Cats)
Fruits vs. Vegetables
Childhood vs. Adulthood
Two different styles of music (ex., Rap music vs. Pop music)
Friends vs. Family
Reality TV vs. Sitcoms
Emails vs. Letters
Being rich vs. Being famous
